title: townsendia incana
intro: Townsendia incana, also known as gray desert marigold, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as possessing antiseptic and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Townsendia incana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and gastrointestinal problems.
